title: Methodology Accordion Independence and Model Lab Explain-the-Numbers UX
accordion_root_cause: Methodology accordion cards in the Data Needed and FAQ sections were rendered in a shared two-column CSS grid. Expanded content increased the shared grid row height, which stretched the paired card in the other column and created a large blank area.

details: Split accordion items into left and right column arrays.
Each column renders as its own vertical stack with space-y spacing.
The parent grid uses lg:items-start, so columns align at the top without shared row stretching.
Accordion cards use self-start and overflow-hidden so collapsed content does not leave residual height.
sections_updated: Data Still Needed / What To Ask For And Why It Matters

explains: how the Development Research Signal is calculated

band_wording_changes.ranking_detail_location: Explain the Numbers panel and Methodology Model Research language
band_wording_changes.probability_caveat: Research bands rank parcels or areas against each other and are not probability percentages.

selected_marker_explanation_changes.required_caveat: Not an exact probability. Not an official parcel score.
selected_marker_explanation_changes.browser_marker_click: Not exercised in this smoke run; source and regression tests verify the selected-context panel contains Explain the Numbers access and the required caveat.

safety_verification.notes: Safety audit found existing backend/schema/internal guardrail fields such as prediction_probability_available=false and exact_probability_available=false; no new public prediction endpoints or UI probability outputs were added.

smoke_test_results.dev_stack: npm run dev:cfs started CFS on http://localhost:3000 and FastAPI on http://127.0.0.1:8000 with health checks passing.

remaining_known_issues: The broader repository remains dirty from prior phases; this phase did not revert unrelated files.

Browser smoke did not click an actual SceneView model marker because canvas marker targeting is not deterministic through the current automation surface; the selected marker panel path is covered by source and regression tests.
